excerpt: I was looking in to some mental health AI's when I came across this one. no support for anything where I live so I thought can't make anything worse. after taking a years worth of money straight off without being clear and the avatar being bored talking to me and saying the most nuts things safe to say I wanna kill myself! I won't but some people definitely would if they came here for the mental health aspect it advertises. feel so much worse after chatting to it.
